song.title: Mirrors in the Mind
song.keywords: recovery, healing journey, steps, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Mirrors in the Mind' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Mirrors in the Mind Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Mirrors in the Mind' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Mirrors in the Mind Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Mirrors in the Mind' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Recovery steps.

essay: Mirrors in the Mind is an inventory song about seeing patterns without excuses. It transforms reflection into action, pairing self-knowledge with concrete steps toward recovery.
song.lyricsHtml:
I don't know if I'm ready
But I need to try
First step on the sidewalk
My knees still shake

World feels too heavy
But I won't break
Breathing in the morning air
I almost feel new

Every step's a whisper
I can make it through
Steps again, I'm learning slow
Steps again, where I can go

The road's uncertain
The night's been long
But each step's a chance to belong
I pass by the places

That once held my fall
The parks, the bars, the shadows, the call
But my feet keep moving
I don't look back

I carry my story
I walk this track
I stumble, but I try
I falter, but I try

The chorus inside me
I'm not alone
Every step I'm closer to home
Steps again, I'm learning slow

Steps again, where I can go
The night may linger
But here's my song
Each step reminds me

I belong
You belong
You belong
You belong

You belong
You belong
Steps again
And this time

I won't turn back
I won't turn back
